markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on SEO priorities and project roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Index Pages:** Psychiatry & Therapy index pages are in design, targeting early next week completion. They will use the same 33-state provider list as Ketamine.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [**Ketamine Page Optimization:** Optimizing the main Ketamine page (`/ketamine`) is now the top priority, ahead of the Alcohol Use Disorder (AUD) page. This is to address a recent drop in paid ad coverage and poor organic ranking for high-intent keywords like "ketamine treatment online."](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [**Insurance Landing Page:** A new, central Insurance landing page is planned to consolidate information and serve as a hub for future, insurance-specific pages (e.g., `/aetna`).](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [**Blog Traffic Drop:** A significant traffic drop on blog pages, starting Feb 17, is being investigated. The timing coincides with a banner UTM update by Shinali, which is a key lead for the analytics team.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)

## Topics

### Ketamine Page Optimization

  - [**Problem:** Paid ad coverage for high-intent keywords ("ketamine treatment online") has dropped since Nov/Dec. The main Ketamine page ranks poorly for these terms, while competitors' main service pages rank highly.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [**Solution:** Optimize the main Ketamine page (`/ketamine`) to improve organic ranking and capture high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [**Actions:** Update copy, expand on insurance, improve internal linking, and refresh metadata.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The homepage cannot be fully optimized for Ketamine without skewing the site's multi-service focus, making the dedicated service page critical for ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Blog Traffic Drop Investigation

  - [**Problem:** A significant traffic drop on blog pages began around Feb 17.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** The timing coincides with a banner UTM update by Shinali on Feb 17.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [**Action:** Matt will contact Shinali for details to provide to the analytics team for investigation.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)

### New Index Pages (Psychiatry & Therapy)

  - [**Scope:** New index pages for Psychiatry and Therapy will use the same 33-state provider list as Ketamine. EMDR is separate with 17 states.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [**Status:** In design; targeting early next week completion.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Bug:** Filtering by service on a city page redirects users to the state page. Matt will report this to Ilan.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**Enhancement:** Add a "Can't find your city?" link to dropdowns, directing users to the state page. Matt will consult the designer on UX.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

### Insurance Landing Page

  - [**Goal:** Create a central hub for all insurance information, replacing the current screener CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [**Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Provide layout structure and copy.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [**Innerwell:** Tomasov & Ilya will build the page.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [**Both:** QA the final page.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)

### Alcohol Use Disorder (AUD) Page

  - [**Status:** AUD service is still in testing but showing promising purchase data.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [**Future Plan:** If launched, create a dedicated AUD service page and add it to the main navigation.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [**Priority:** This project is now secondary to Ketamine page optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)

### Editorial Strategy & Content

  - [**Psychiatry Content:** A content roadmap is in progress, mirroring the successful Ketamine strategy (awareness, access, comparisons). The "comparisons" cluster needs further definition.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [**Production Cadence:** Publish 1–2 Psychiatry-focused articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [**Testimonial CTAs:** Matt proposed adding video testimonials as banner breaks in blog content to shallow the funnel (e.g., link to a review page instead of a screener).](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
      - [**Action:** Akina will provide available testimonials for Matt to review.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [Deliver Psychiatry & Therapy index page designs (early next week).](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [Report city-filter bug to Ilan.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
      - [Consult designer on "Can't find your city?" UX.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [Confirm footer update priority with the technical SEO team.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [Contact Shinali for details on the Feb 17 UTM update.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [Provide layout and copy for the Insurance landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
      - [Assign resources for Ketamine page optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [**Akina:**](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
      - [Provide available customer testimonials to Matt.](https://fathom.video/share/mxSYYjfn591tp3_tjs69h8-NhNVigxdk?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
